channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Erector spinae plane blocks may not offer significant advantages over standard pain relief in breast surgery
item.description: Erector spinae plane blocks reduced PACU opioid use and slightly shortened stays, but lacked clinically meaningful overall benefit.

item.title: Study reveals neighborhood influence on women's heart health over decades
item.description: Women in disadvantaged neighborhoods have worse heart health and faster declines near menopause, a long-term study finds.

item.title: Reducing daily choices can benefit your brain, experts say
item.description: Modern life offers endless options, but cutting back on daily decisions may improve mental well-being.

item.title: First fatality reported in New York City Legionnaires' outbreak
item.description: Health officials confirmed the first death in a Legionnaires' outbreak that has sickened dozens in New York City.
